features.evidence: I am very impressed! The laptop arrived a day early, well packaged, contained a charger, it looks almost new with some minor scratches and works exceptionally well (strong battery) I flashed the bios as soon as I got it and installed Fedora 43 (not dual boot and I wiped out Windows 10

Brightness is easily adjustable Everything works as it should including the touch screen
